findings.title: Library colors (npm) has known track record: protestware_incident
findings.summary: 2022 protestware incident — maintainer intentionally introduced infinite-loop sabotage; rehabilitated but warrants supply-chain review The architectural choice to depend on this package warrants review regardless of which specific CVE is currently outstanding.

findings.title: Library js-yaml (npm) has known track record: abandoned_with_known_cves
findings.summary: legacy versions (<3.13.0) allow code execution via unsafe-load default; pin or migrate to safe-load explicit usage The architectural choice to depend on this package warrants review regardless of which specific CVE is currently outstanding.

findings.title: Library jsonwebtoken (npm) has known track record: abandoned_with_known_cves
findings.summary: legacy versions (<9.0.0) allow algorithm-confusion attacks (CVE-2022-23529); pin >= 9 or migrate to jose The architectural choice to depend on this package warrants review regardless of which specific CVE is currently outstanding.

findings.title: Library libxmljs2 (npm) has known track record: abandoned_with_known_cves
findings.summary: multiple unfixed XXE CVEs since 2022; native libxml2 bindings without active security maintenance The architectural choice to depend on this package warrants review regardless of which specific CVE is currently outstanding.

findings.title: Library notevil (npm) has known track record: sandboxed_deprecated
findings.summary: known-broken JavaScript sandbox — should never be used as a security boundary; multiple escape CVEs The architectural choice to depend on this package warrants review regardless of which specific CVE is currently outstanding.
